Node.description: Chassis information to add a chassis to a chassis chain.

PropertyDouble.name: cableLength
PropertyDouble.description: Length of the cable from the current chassis to the next chassis downstream. Valid values are 0.0, 3.0, 6.0, 9.0, 12.0, 15.0, 18.0, 21.0, 24.0

PropertyBoolean.name: physicalChain
PropertyBoolean.description: true if this chassis part of a physical chain, false otherwise.

PropertyString.name: masterChassis
PropertyString.description: ip address of the master chassis if this chassis is a slave

PropertyString.name: managementIP
PropertyString.description: Management ip address of the chassis.

PropertyNodeList.name: cardList
PropertyNodeList.description: The list of card info to be shown in the GUI when the chassis is not accessible
